name: SafeClaw Security
description: Runtime policy enforcement, transcript sanitization, and audit events for OpenClaw.

configPath.description: Path to the SafeClaw YAML policy file, relative to the plugin root or absolute.

overridePath.description: Legacy JSON override file path for one-time migration into SQLite; no longer used for ongoing strategy persistence.

dbPath.description: Path to local SQLite database for strategy persistence, runtime status, and decision history.

webhookUrl.description: Optional override for SecurityDecisionEvent webhook delivery.

decisionLogMaxLength.description: Max serialized argument length included in SafeClaw decision logs.

statusPath.description: Path to runtime status JSON written by SafeClaw for dashboard monitoring.

adminAutoStart.description: Whether to auto-start SafeClaw admin dashboard when plugin is loaded (default true).

adminPort.description: Optional admin dashboard listen port. Defaults to SAFECLAW_ADMIN_PORT or 4780.

approvalBridge.description: Optional chat-based approval bridge for generic SafeClaw challenge rules.

enabled.description: Enable chat approval bridge for challenge rules. Approved requests are replay-allowed for the same session and request shape until expiry.

targets.description: Admin chat destinations that receive approval prompts.

approvers.description: Approved chat senders who may run /safeclaw-approve, /safeclaw-reject, and /safeclaw-pending.
